## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team changes: Sadira moving to strategy focus team; Darrell joining as new account director](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Content performance improving, especially for new articles and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [New Looker dashboard coming soon for more robust analytics](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Exploring new content strategies, including AI translation and Spanish-language focus](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Careful approach needed for compliance/security content due to enterprise sales considerations](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes and Introductions

  - [Sadira transitioning to strategy focus team but still helping with content quality](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Darrell joining as new account director, bringing journalism and tech industry experience](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Carrie taking over as main point of contact for content review and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Blog traffic rising in impressions, slight dip in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [New content performing well, with 69 clicks this week](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Categories seeing improvement: employee texting, incident communications, enterprise, SOPs](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Steady improvement in backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Exploring new content ideas:](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [AI translation (broad topic with potential for specific focus on Spanish)](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [Manufacturing industries and lean principles](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [Problem-specific content (e.g., "how to respond when an employee is sick")](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

### Upcoming Deliverables

  - [New Looker dashboard coming soon with in-depth analytics](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Six-month analysis in progress](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Ongoing keyword research and Airtable cluster updates](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [16 articles ready for review, to be published over next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

### Content Considerations

  - [Balancing broad topics (e.g., AI translation) with specific, conversion-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Careful approach to compliance/security content due to enterprise sales sensitivities](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Focusing on user pain points and specific questions they might ask](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Potential to leverage sales team data for identifying key decision factors](https://fathom.video/share/xEe4Fkzxmp6UJacynEzAqxVEexQWxj3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
